# Battwheels OS

Battwheels OS is India's first AI-powered EV service management platform, built by Battwheels Services Private Limited. It is a multi-tenant SaaS platform that serves EV workshop owners, fleet operators, electric vehicle OEMs, and field technicians across India.

## Core Capabilities
Battwheels OS includes 16 integrated modules: Service Ticket Management with SLA tracking, GST-compliant invoicing and estimates, double-entry accounting, inventory management with COGS, HR and payroll, AMC contract management, customer portal, technician portal, and platform administration.

## Battwheels EFI™
The platform's proprietary AI diagnostic engine delivers vehicle-specific EV fault guidance, safety protocols, technician recommendations, and a continuously learning knowledge brain — all branded as Battwheels EFI™.

## Target Users
- Independent EV workshop owners and service managers
- Fleet operators managing electric vehicle maintenance
- Electric vehicle OEMs requiring service network management
- EV field technicians needing AI-assisted diagnostics

## Compliance
GST-compliant for India. Supports GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, e-invoicing, HSN validation, TDS calculation, and period locking per Indian financial standards.
